EmergencyEntry.title: Emergency Training Entry
EmergencyEntry.description: A user's submission for emergency procedures on a specific date, grouped by questions.

date.description: The date of the training in YYYY-MM-DD format.

answers.description: Answers for each of the 4 emergency questions.

LimitationEntry.title: Limitations Training Entry
LimitationEntry.description: A summary of a user's attempt at the limitations test.

date.description: The date of the training in YYYY-MM-DD format.

filled.description: Number of fields filled by the user.

/emergencies/{id}.description: Collection of anonymous emergency procedure submissions.

/limitations/{id}.description: Collection of anonymous limitations test results.
